Help & Sync Guide

Mark owned: click deck → select variant → Mark Owned.

Sync collection: 💾 Save ▾ → Push collection.json to GitHub → phone auto-loads on refresh.

After code updates: just upload new index.html. collection.json stays untouched.

Phone not updating? 💾 Save ▾ → Force resync from website.

Tips: Click "Jumpstart Deck Browser" to reset filters. Password: jumpstart.

🔐 Enter Edit Password

Incorrect password. Try again.

When enabled: mark collection on this device.

Default password is set in index.html — search for EDIT_PASSWORD to change it.

Edit Deck
